Description: Draft feature for improving developer ergonomics, packaging, and higher-level test coverage.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add broader integration coverage for multi-day trips and model-assisted decision paths.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has high-value integration coverage for real-world trip scenarios.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add packaging, documentation, and local developer workflows that make the tool easier to run and maintain.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has a maintainable local packaging and developer workflow story.
